idea-plugin.name: Animoria
idea-plugin.description:
Animoria — Codebase Governance & Visual Tracking

Workspace analysis, tracking, and asset governance for heavy animation structures (Lottie, Rive, GIF, SVG) directly inside your IDE sidebar.

Animoria acts as a local-first visual asset memory for developer teams who care about craft and codebase health. It automates the structural audit and reference tracing of animated files in large repositories to prevent production bundle bloat and technical debt.

Key Features:

  • Asset Governance: Automatically scan and identify Unused (orphan) animations, Duplicate assets (identical MD5 file hashes), or Overused files exceeding customizable reference thresholds.
  • Usage Traceability: Trace where assets are referenced across Kotlin, Java, JavaScript, TypeScript, Swift, Dart, and more, jumping directly to the source file line.
  • Multi-Format Strategy: Seamlessly parses Lottie (.json), dotLottie (.lottie), Rive (.riv), GIF/APNG (.gif/.apng), and Animated SVG (.svg).
  • Local & Offline-First: Secure, offline processing guarantees code and asset data never leave your local workspace.
